title: Tail's Totem
description: This resource pack replaces the default totem of undying with a cute mini Tails model from Sonic. It also changes the sound played when the totem is used, giving it a fun and unique twist.
body:
**This set of resources replaces the standard totem of Immortality in Minecraft with a charming model of Mini Tails, a favorite character from the Sonic the Hedgehog series.**

---

**In addition to the visual changes, the default activation sound is also being replaced with Tails' voice, taken from the official Sonic Adventure 2 game. Now that you're avoiding death in battle, Tails himself will cheer you on, giving you hope and strength to keep fighting!**

The textures were created by me manually, and the sound was edited based on the official voiceover in the game.

**I plan to release versions of this package for older versions of Minecraft and Bedrock Edition in the near future.**
